reply: (1) This device is a Square D Motor Control Center Panel MCC-003, used to control and protect motor circuits. (2) The most probable fault cause is a short circuit or a presence of a ground fault in the 24VDC circuit. (3) The tech should check for any visible signs of overheating or damage on the MCC-003 and ensure all connections are secure. For an unknown fault, the tech should start by verifying the integrity of the 24VDC power supply and any load connected to the circuit.
